title: Dynocaps
description: Travel with the comfort of your own home
body: # Dynocaps # About Dynocaps are handheld items that allow you to "capture" and transport large areas with to power of End technology. Some common use cases would be having a traveling house so you can explore more areas or keeps a secret and secure cache of items on you as all times # Features * Builtin color-coding for dynocaps(ingui) * Capule Case for compacting or grouping dynocaps ## [For Pack developers](https://gitlab.com/biom4st3r/dynocaps/-/blob/default/FOR_MOD_PACK_MAKERS.md) * Prefab(rusty caps) that and be saved and added to loottables - this is enabled by a custom loot table entry type * Loottable Tweaker - builtin json tool for adding entries to loot tables * Capabilities of dynocaps are highly configurable * Multiple template dynocap can be registered with different capabilities # Issues If you find an issue please report it at my [Gitlab](https://gitlab.com/biom4st3r/dynocaps/issues). Feel free to request new features also. `If your issue is related to a crash: please provide a crash log link hosted on pastebin/hastebin/etc` [Pastebin](https://pastebin.com/) [Hastebin](https://www.toptal.com/developers/hastebin) If you like my work and would like to support me consider donating to my Ko-fi! [![Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/biom4st3r)
